title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Ratna Sagar
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ratna Sagar family as a Instructional Designer in Madurai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ratna Sagar:
Ratna Sagar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ratna Sagar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
